normalizedRecordFamilies.purpose: Lineage row for every raw file, including source, endpoint, fetch time, checksum, byte size, content type, and raw path.
Point/time weather values such as temperature, humidity, wind, pressure, precipitation, radiation, air quality, and model samples.
Buoy, tide, water-level, wave, and tsunami station observations.
Air quality pollutant and index values such as PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO2, SO2, CO, AQI, aerosols, smoke, and dust.
River, stream, reservoir, water-level, and hydrology observations or forecasts.
Earthquakes, cyclones, floods, wildfires, volcanoes, warnings, watches, and severe-storm outlooks.
GeoJSON/ArcGIS/OSM-style features such as alerts, polygons, faults, watersheds, infrastructure, and exposure context.
Catalog/process/product metadata for sources that need async jobs or large downloads.
Binary/grid/tile assets such as GRIB2, NetCDF, HDF, GeoTIFF, imagery tiles, and byte samples.
Calculated values such as heat index, wind chill, risk score, exposure score, vulnerability score, confidence, and source reliability.
Selected frontend-ready current value per parameter/location from all supporting evidence records.
